C:\K210\toolchain\kendryte-toolchain\bin\riscv64-unknown-elf-gcc.exe   -mcmodel=medany -march=rv64imafdc -fno-common -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fstrict-volatile-bitfields -O2 -ggdb -std=gnu11 -L"D:/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus_Boot/include/" -g  -nostartfiles -static -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-static -Wl,--start-group -Wl,--whole-archive -Wl,--no-whole-archive -Wl,--end-group -Wl,-EL -T "D:/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus_Boot/lds/kendryte.ld" "c:/k210/toolchain/kendryte-toolchain/bin/../lib/gcc/riscv64-unknown-elf/8.2.0/crti.o" "c:/k210/toolchain/kendryte-toolchain/bin/../lib/gcc/riscv64-unknown-elf/8.2.0/crtbegin.o" CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/startup.S.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/jump.S.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/newlib_locks.c.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/D_/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus/protocol/kupdate_v2.c.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/D_/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus/firmware_v2/common/sha256_stream.c.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/D_/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus/firmware_v2/common/k210_flash.c.obj CMakeFiles/k210_boot_v2.dir/D_/w_space/K210_AI_V7s_Plus/firmware_v2/common/kboot_meta_v2.c.obj "c:/k210/toolchain/kendryte-toolchain/bin/../lib/gcc/riscv64-unknown-elf/8.2.0/crtend.o" "c:/k210/toolchain/kendryte-toolchain/bin/../lib/gcc/riscv64-unknown-elf/8.2.0/crtn.o" -o k210_boot_v2  -Wl,--start-group -lm -latomic -lc hal\libhal.a -Wl,--end-group -lm
